headline: How Cramer’s Bullish Call and Options Signal At Howmet Aerospace (HWM) Has Changed Its Investment Story
summary: In early March 2026, Howmet Aerospace drew fresh attention as Jim Cramer praised its technology and “sweet spot” positioning in the strong aerospace and defense markets, while options data showed elevated put activity and a historically bullish put/call ratio signal. Behind the headlines, the combination of robust commercial and defense aerospace demand with shifting options sentiment underscored how both fundamentals and trading positioning are shaping investor interest in Howmet. We’ll now...

headline: Howmet Aerospace and GE Vernova Stocks Are Up Big in 2026, Extending Massive Rallies
summary: Howmet Aerospace (NYSE:HWM) and GE Vernova (NYSE:GEV) are two of the market’s most compelling stories heading into spring 2026. Both stocks are extending multi-year rallies that most investors would have called impossible just a few years ago, and both are doing it for the same underlying reason: the world desperately needs more power, and these ... headline: This Defense Stock Has a Total Return of 748% Over the Past 5 Years
summary: Howmet Aerospace (HWM) delivered a 748.75% total return over five years, vastly outperforming the S&P 500 Index. Shares are up more than 105% over the past year. HWM maintains a 100% “Buy” technical opinion from Barchart. Fundamentals remain robust with strong projected revenue and earnings growth. Author’s Note: HWM was...

headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Howmet Aerospace (HWM) After Its 5x Three Year Surge?
summary: If you are wondering whether Howmet Aerospace's share price still lines up with its underlying value, you are not alone. That is exactly what this article will unpack for you. The stock recently closed at US$253.91, with a 1.9% decline over the last 7 days, a 13.8% gain over 30 days, 19.9% year to date, 102.8% over 1 year, and a very large 3 year and 5 year return of about 5x and 7x respectively. These moves have kept Howmet on many investors' watchlists, with ongoing corporate updates and...
